seoTitle: Redmond West vs Regans Ford — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Redmond West and Regans Ford. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Redmond West vs Regans Ford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Redmond West and Regans Ford.
heading: Redmond West vs Regans Ford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Redmond West, Western Australia and Regans Ford, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Redmond West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Regans Ford (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Redmond West or Regans Ford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Redmond West has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Regans Ford scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Redmond West scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Regans Ford scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Redmond West or Regans Ford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Redmond West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
